completed.subtitle: Read the summary, understand the main ideas, then reinforce the knowledge with a quiz.
completed.readyDescription: The summary and questions were prepared around the same learning flow. Read quickly first, then move to the quiz.

failed.title: Video could not be processed
failed.description: This can sometimes happen because of video access, video length, or high AI demand.

processing.title: Turning video into a learning set
processing.description: For longer videos, this can take 1–2 minutes.

steps.extractingIdeas: Extracting the main ideas from the video...
steps.splittingSummary: Breaking the summary into learnable pieces...
steps.takingLonger: This video is long, so it is taking a bit more time. Your set is being prepared...

trustRows.compress: We are compressing a 1-hour video into a learning set you can review in minutes.
trustRows.mainIdeas: Questions are prepared from the main ideas in the video, not just the summary.
trustRows.answers: Even the wrong options are checked to make them educational.
